ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the fund */,
  "total_number_of_holdings_in_port" INTEGER /* Total number of holdings in the fund's portfolio */,
  "fund_expense_ratio" REAL /* Annual expense ratio of the fund */,
  "asset_class_focus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class focus */,
  "fund_objective_long" TEXT /* Long description of the fund's objective */,
  "eqy_dvd_yld_ind" REAL /* Equity dividend yield of the fund */,
  "inception_date" TEXT /* Date the fund was established */,
  "asset_under_management" REAL /* Total value of assets managed by the fund */,
  "management_fees" REAL /* Annual management fees as a percentage */,
  "performance_fees" REAL /* Performance-based fees as a percentage */,
  "min_investment_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount required for investment */,
  "is_open_for_investment" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the fund is open for new investments */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fund's data */,
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund's objective */,
  "region_focus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fund's regional focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_objective_id FOREIGN KEY ("objective_id") REFERENCES fund_objectives ("objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_asset_class_focus_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class_focus_id") REFERENCES asset_class_focus ("asset_class_focus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_class_focus" (
  "asset_class_focus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset class focus */,
  "asset_class_focus_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset class focus */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset class focus */,
  "min_investment_amount" REAL /* Minimum investment amount for this asset class */,
  "is_recommended_for_new_investors" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the asset class is recommended for new investors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_class_focus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_objectives" (
  "objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund objective */,
  "objective_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund objective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund objective */,
  "min_investment_amount" REAL /* Minimum investment amount for this objective */,
  "is_recommended_for_new_investors" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether this objective is recommended for new investors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("objective_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund the holding belongs to */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security held */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the security held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the security */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the security was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current market value of the holding */,
  "market_price" REAL /* Current market price of the security */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the holding's data was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the holding is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "security_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of security */,
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issuer of the security */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the security was issued */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current market price of the security */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the security's data was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the security is active */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_security_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_type_id") REFERENCES security_types ("security_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_issuer_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuer_id") REFERENCES issuers ("issuer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_types" (
  "security_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security type */,
  "security_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the security type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security type */,
  "is Tradable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the security type is tradable */,
  "min_investment_amount" REAL /* Minimum investment amount for this security type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issuers" (
  "issuer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issuer */,
  "issuer_name" TEXT /* Name of the issuer */,
  "issuer_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of issuer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the issuer is based */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the issuer operates in */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the issuer's website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the issuer was founded */,
  "is_publicly_traded" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the issuer is publicly traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issuers_issuer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("issuer_type_id") REFERENCES issuer_types ("issuer_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issuers_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issuer_types" (
  "issuer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issuer type */,
  "issuer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the issuer type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issuer type */,
  "min_investment_amount" REAL /* Minimum investment amount for this issuer type */,
  "is_recommended_for_new_investors" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether this issuer type is recommended for new investors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issuer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "min_investment_amount" REAL /* Minimum investment amount for this industry */,
  "is_recommended_for_new_investors" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether this industry is recommended for new investors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date the user last changed their password */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "can_access_financial_data" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the role can access financial data */,
  "can_modify_funds" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the role can modify fund details */,
  "can_view_audit_logs" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the role can view audit logs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
